description: James Rothwell, VP of Marketing at Binance, discusses the future of Web3, emphasizing decentralization, community building, and the potential of fan tokens and NFTs to enhance user experiences in entertainment and sports.
topic_summary: Rothwell explores the impact of Web3 on user engagement, the creation of fan economies, and the integration of NFTs in enhancing experiences at events like Primavera Sound Festival [t=263.24].
